data.content: Replaced the Setlist summary panel's / wrapper with a simple padded section that matches the Escalations headline container's effective top and left inset. The Setlist title keeps the same text-base semibold tracking-tight styling, and the plan grid now begins exactly five pixels below the title row so the title row no longer snaps right or down when toggling between Setlist and Escalations. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: worktree-foolery-setlist-headline-align.
